analysis.reasoning: Core message: An informational tweet announcing that EU home affairs ministers will discuss migration/asylum, cooperation with non-EU countries on migration, and EU police cooperation. It shares meeting info without evaluative language. EU1 (successful story): Not promoted—no reference to history, overcoming obstacles, or success claims. EU2 (united): Not promoted—no mention of agreement, unity, or solidarity; merely an agenda. EU3 (useful for citizens): Partially relevant topic (migration, police cooperation) could imply utility, but the tweet does not claim benefits, effectiveness, or proactive problem-solving; it’s neutral scheduling, so not promoted. EU4 (avant-garde): No claims of pioneering policies. EU5 (global champion of fair causes): Not referenced. EU6 (contributes to a better world): Although it mentions cooperation with non-EU countries, there is no framing about global contributions, peace, or betterment; purely procedural. Conclusion: No specific strategic narrative is being promoted.
